info.title: EEDataGift
info.description: ee.co.uk data gift automation script using C# Selenium chrome driver. Windows only.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Automation of Gift Data flow on the EE My Account area (windows only!)

options.name: username
options.description: Your EE username (usually your email address)

options.name: gift-mb
options.description: Megabytes to gift (Ensure you have enough!)

options.name: chrome-path
options.description: Chrome path e.g. C:\chrome\chrome.exe or .\chrome.exe. Will search PATH if not provided.
